About GLA

Located in the divine land of Mathura, Uttar Pradesh, GLA University is among the top private universities in India to receive 12B Status from UGC. We nurture our students with multifaceted education in the streams like management, engineering, law, computers, etc. With over 30,000 alumni working across the globe in top-notch companies, GLA has carved its identity as the gateway to global success.

Future-Ready Programmes at GLA

B.Tech

B.Tech is a 4-year full-time UG programme offered in different specialisations University for students who have done their 10+2 in Physics, Mathematics, and Chemistry/ Computer Engineering with 50% marks.

BCA

Bachelor of Computer Applications is a full-time 3-year UG degree programme for students seeking a career in the computer programming field. 10+2 passed students in any stream with 50% marks can apply.

BBA

Bachelor of Business Administration is a full-time 3-year UG degree programme for students who want to start their management journey. Those who have passed 10+2 with 50% marks in any stream can apply for this programme.

Integrated L.L.B (BA)

Students interested in a 5-year Integrated L.L.B (BA/B.Com) programme can start their legal education at GLA. Those with 50% marks at 10+2 in any stream can apply for this programme.

B. Pharma

Under this 4-year B.Pharma programme, students will learn the various chemical & biological components used for the manufacturing of medicines. They also will learn the right implementation methods of those medicines on patients.

BA

The 3-year BA programme is offered in different specializations like English, Economics, etc., to meet the variegated academic interests of the students. Those who have passed 12th with 50% marks in any stream can apply.

B.Com

This course is designed to inculcate financial understanding in students. The course curriculum includes subjects of finance & accountancy and business management to provide comprehensive knowledge of commerce.

B.Sc

B.Sc. (Hons.) Chemistry/ Physics/ Biotech is a 3-year UG programme. Also, a 4-year B.Sc. (H) Agriculture is offered. Candidates must complete 10+2 in the science stream with a minimum of 50% marks in the respective subject from a recognised board in the country.

B.Ed

The 2-year B.Ed aims at preparing dedicated, knowledgeable, skilled, creative and disciplined school teachers who can perform complex duties for effective classroom teaching and elevate the growth of Indian school system.

Diploma (Electronics & Communications)

The field of Electronics & Communications focuses on concepts of electrical engineering, electronic devices and relevant software. Candidates must have passed 10th with at least 40% marks with Maths as a compulsory subject.

Diploma (Civil Engineering)

The Diploma in Civil Engineering consists of studying the design, construction, and maintenance of the physical and naturally built environment. Candidates must have passed 10th with at least 40% marks with Maths as a compulsory subject.

Diploma (Computer Science & Engineering)

Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering is a program of study that offers students training in technology specializing in server configuration, computer connections, network installation, software development, etc.

Diploma (Electrical Engineering)

Diploma in Electrical Engineering is a certificate/beginner level course in Electrical Engineering and its related aspects. One can pursue the Program after completion of his/her class 10th with 40% marks.

Diploma (Mechanical Engineering)

Diploma in Mechanical Engineering at GLA offers experiential learning with state of the art labs like CNC lab, Advanced Production Labs, Automobile Engineering Labs, Refrigeration and Air-conditioning Lab, and Industrial Automation Lab.

Diploma (Chemical Engineering)

Diploma in Chemical Engineering is a comprehensive study of physical sciences, i.e. Physics and Chemistry and life sciences viz microbiology, biochemistry, and biology, applying mathematics and economics.

M.Tech

The 2-year full-time M.Tech programme is offered in seven core specializations at GLA University. Applicants with 1st Division in B Tech in the relevant branch or MCA (for Computer Science) can apply.

MCA

Master of Computer Applications (MCA) emphasises designing and developing the real-life application of information system. It gives a robust foundation for learning new technologies in computing.

MBA

The MBA Programme at GLA nurtures leaders capable of making a difference in the corporate and service sectors. The varsity employs various modes of teaching, learning and assessment that reflect in its interdisciplinary approach.

M.Pharma

M.Pharma is approved by the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI) and enables students to engage in advanced study and research in manufacturing bulk drugs. Applicants must have first Division in B.Pharma.

M.Sc

M.Sc. in Mathematics/ Microbiology/ Chemistry/ Physics/ Bio-Tech involves advanced studies of the respective subject to lay a strong foundation for supporting employability in industry and background for research.
